title: Minimum playable interaction command chain
summary: Implement at least one real player interaction chain, such as selecting a lantern and prioritizing lamp work, with traceable command or documented adapter state and UI feedback.
acceptance: Player can select a lantern/resident/object and issue one meaningful action from the HUD command surface
The action reaches an existing protocol/simulation command path or a reviewed, documented local adapter that is explicitly non-authoritative and traceable
Read-model or shell state changes visibly as a result, including queued/action feedback and a structured reason
The implementation does not fake world authority, bypass Simulation Worker ownership, or claim final game balance
E2E tests cover the full chain from selection to command/action feedback in zh-CN and en
forbiddenPaths: unreviewed public Worker protocol or save schema changes
claiming public save compatibility or final release readiness
